updates.title: Smoother Saving and Faster App Flow
changes: Trips, shifts, and expenses now refresh more smoothly while you work
Reduced interruptions during save and sync actions
Improved responsiveness across key pages
General reliability and stability improvements

updates.title: Better Demo Setup Experience
changes: Starting with a demo sheet is now smoother and more reliable
Added clearer status banners when a demo sheet is connected
Improved onboarding flow for first-time users

updates.title: Clearer Colors Across Light and Dark Mode
changes: Improved color consistency throughout the app
Made text and UI elements easier to read in both themes
Reduced visual mismatches across screens
Set up a stronger base for future visual polish

updates.title: More Reliable Voice Entry
changes: Improved voice input stability when adding trip details
Reduced edge-case failures during voice entry
Added stronger quality checks to prevent regressions

updates.title: Cleaner Trip Layout and Sync Messages
changes: Made trip details easier to scan and read
Improved sync message formatting for better clarity
Polished layout behavior on smaller screens

updates.title: Issues & Refactoring
changes: Code cleanup and bug fixes
Performance improvements
Enhanced error handling

updates.title: Search with Voice Support
changes: Added voice command input for trips
Improved search accuracy with fuzzy matching
Moved diagnostics to dedicated page
Enhanced search filters

updates.title: Privacy Policy & Expense Enhancements
changes: Updated privacy policy for clarity
Added expense categories
Improved expense tracking features

updates.title: Demo Spreadsheet Support
changes: Users can test with demo data
No Google account required for demo
Sample trips and shifts included

updates.title: Setup Page Styling Updates
changes: Improved setup page layout
Better mobile responsiveness
Enhanced visual design

updates.title: Improved Trips and Shifts Tables
changes: Tables are easier to read and navigate
Better sorting and filtering of your data
Improved table layout on mobile devices

updates.title: Layout Fixes for Trips and Shifts
changes: Improved page layouts on both mobile and desktop
Fixed the back-to-top button
Various usability tweaks

updates.title: App-Wide Visual Redesign
changes: Refreshed the look and feel across all pages
Faster loading for large spreadsheets
Search results are more reliable on slow connections
Improved display of places and names

updates.title: Sign In with Google
changes: You can now sign in using your Google account
Spreadsheet access is handled securely via Google sign-in
Streamlined authentication flow during setup

updates.title: Google Maps Search
changes: Search for places on Google Maps
Search for addresses on Google Maps
Direct map integration from app

updates.title: Under-the-Hood Performance Improvements
changes: Rebuilt app internals for faster load times
Reduced memory usage across all pages
Improved stability on low-end devices

updates.title: Faster and More Stable Data Loading
changes: Reduced errors from too many data requests at once
Improved overall data loading performance

updates.title: Real-Time Sync and Address Search Improvements
changes: App now stays in sync without needing a manual refresh
Saved data loads more consistently
Address suggestions are more accurate and responsive
Various UI fixes and polish
